top.name: Omniscience
top.rules_text: Draw your entire deck. For this turn all spells cost 0. At end of turn discard your hand and exile 3 random cards from your discard.

bottom.name: Arcane Apotheosis
bottom.rules_text: Permanent: gain +1 charge per spell cast. Your Replicate copies now also copy the bottom half. Spells that cost 3+ gain Reaction speed.

channel.name: Arcane Apotheosis (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: All spells gain Reaction speed
